---
title: "Contact"
---

I welcome correspondence from researchers, journalists, policymakers, and anyone interested in my work.

**Email:** [rmcgrat2@gmu.edu](mailto:rmcgrat2@gmu.edu)

---

**Office / Mailing Address**

[Schar School of Policy and Government](https://schar.gmu.edu)<br>
George Mason University<br>
4400 University Dr., MSN 3F4<br>
Fairfax, Virginia 22030

<!-- Update office hours text as needed -->

**Availability:** Office hours by appointment. Please email to arrange a meeting time.

---

**Professional Profiles**

<div class="pub-buttons" style="margin-top: 0.5rem;">
  <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0001-8963-3231" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" target="_blank" rel="noopener">ORCID</a>
  <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=kQEBg6wAAAAJ" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Google Scholar</a>
  <a href="https://github.com/rjm328" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" target="_blank" rel="noopener">GitHub</a>
  <!-- Replace YOURHANDLE with your actual LinkedIn username -->
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/YOURHANDLE" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" target="_blank" rel="noopener">LinkedIn</a>
</div>
